title: CME Group 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for business description, volume mix, market infrastructure role, and risk factors.

title: Globex: Electronic Trading
note: Product page describing CME Globex access, electronic trading role, connectivity, certification, and market coverage.

title: Clearing
note: Product page describing CME Clearing as a central counterparty clearing provider and margin-services platform.

title: Financial Safeguards
note: Explains CME Clearing margin cycles, guaranty fund structure, and Cover 2 default-risk standard.

title: CME Group Inc. (CME) Stock Price & Overview
note: Market-data profile used for ticker, IPO date, revenue, net income, shares, and current valuation context.

title: CME Group Market Cap
note: Market capitalization source for current market cap and historical market cap near IPO.

title: CME Group Statistics & Valuation
note: Valuation source for trailing P/E and share statistics.

title: QuickFIX/J
note: Open-source FIX engine source used as a plausible open replacement component for exchange connectivity and order-routing infrastructure.

title: Strata Documentation
note: Documentation for OpenGamma Strata, an open-source analytics and market-risk library relevant to derivatives risk workflows.

title: Open Source Risk Engine
note: Describes ORE as an open-source risk engine for valuation and risk analytics across derivatives and bonds.

title: Open Source Risk Engine GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for Open Source Risk Engine.
